# SentinelGuard Minifilter Driver - CMake Build
#
# Requirements:
#   - Visual Studio 2022 with C++ Desktop workload
#   - Windows Driver Kit (WDK) installed
#   - CMake 3.20+
#
# Build:
#   cmake -B build -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A x64
#   cmake --build build --config Release
#
# Note: This CMakeLists.txt is a reference for the driver source structure.
# WDK-based drivers are typically built using MSBuild / Visual Studio project
# files generated by the WDK integration. For production use, create a
# WDK KMDF project in Visual Studio 2022 and add these source files.
#
# Alternatively, use the FindWDK CMake module if available in your environment.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(SentinelGuardDriver C)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)

# WDK paths - adjust to your installation
set(WDK_ROOT "C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10" CACHE PATH "WDK root directory")
set(WDK_VERSION "" CACHE STRING "WDK version (e.g. 10.0.22621.0)")

# If WDK_VERSION is not set, try to find it
if(NOT WDK_VERSION)
    file(GLOB WDK_VERSIONS "${WDK_ROOT}/Include/*")
    list(SORT WDK_VERSIONS)
    list(GET WDK_VERSIONS -1 WDK_VERSION_PATH)
    get_filename_component(WDK_VERSION "${WDK_VERSION_PATH}" NAME)
    message(STATUS "Auto-detected WDK version: ${WDK_VERSION}")
endif()

set(WDK_INCLUDE "${WDK_ROOT}/Include/${WDK_VERSION}")
set(WDK_LIB "${WDK_ROOT}/Lib/${WDK_VERSION}")

# Source files
set(DRIVER_SOURCES
    src/driver.c
    src/communication.c
    src/operations.c
)

set(DRIVER_HEADERS
    src/driver.h
    src/communication.h
)

# Note: Kernel driver compilation requires specific compiler flags and
# link settings that are normally handled by the WDK MSBuild integration.
# This CMake file documents the project structure. For actual compilation:
#
# 1. Open Visual Studio 2022
# 2. Create a new "Kernel Mode Driver, Empty (KMDF)" project
# 3. Add the source files from src/
# 4. Set the altitude and class in the .inf file
# 5. Build with the WDK toolchain
#
# Or use the FindWDK.cmake module:
# https://github.com/SergiusTheBest/FindWDK

message(STATUS "SentinelGuard Driver source files:")
foreach(SRC ${DRIVER_SOURCES})
    message(STATUS "  ${SRC}")
endforeach()

message(STATUS "")
message(STATUS "To build the driver, use Visual Studio 2022 with WDK integration")
message(STATUS "or a CMake FindWDK module. The source files are listed above.")
